title: Pilgrammed Songpack/Soundtrack
description: Adds majority of the Pilgrammed soundtrack into the game.
body:
[REQUIRES REACTIVE MUSIC]

Adds majority of the Pilgrammed soundtrack into the game, using the Reactive Music mod to play tracks which fit the environment you're playing in.


Credits: 
Bonzods, BLUDDBRAIN, Phexonia Studios


Curseforge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pilgrammed-songpack-soundtrack
